name: HeyHoney
description: A mobile app that turns everyday couple moments into shared adventures. Players earn points, unlock milestones, and deepen their bond through playful daily challenges synced in real-time.

name: FlyingPapers
tagline: AI-native document collection for regulated workflows
description: Structured document collection platform for visas, apostilles, and contracts. Clients upload and translate documents guided by AI-generated checklists. Reviewers approve via canvas-based editing tools.

name: PromptArena
description: Users negotiate against GPT-4, Claude, and LLaMA opponents in live sessions. A judge system scores every exchange. Built for sales teams and founders who want to sharpen their persuasion skills.

name: YourLovePage
tagline: Personal sharable pages for love letters and tributes
description: Create a beautiful, permanent page dedicated to someone you love. Share a link — no account required to view. Built for anniversaries, birthdays, and unforgettable moments.

name: adhd-os
tagline: Voice-note and task management for ADHD brains
description: A mobile operating system for the ADHD mind. Speak your thoughts, let AI structure them into tasks, and surface the right thing at the right moment — no friction, no forgetting.

name: Enflasyon Sepeti
tagline: Crowdsourced real-time inflation tracker for Turkey
description: Citizens report current prices for everyday goods. Aggregated data reveals real-world inflation trends across cities, giving people transparent, crowd-verified price intelligence.

name: Phantom
description: An internal automation pipeline that takes a topic, writes a script with GPT-4, generates voice with ElevenLabs, renders video with Remotion, and publishes — all without human intervention.

name: Social Profiling
tagline: NLP demographics prediction from social media text
description: TÜBITAK-funded research applying transformer models (BERTweet) and fine-tuned LLMs to predict demographic attributes from Turkish social media content.
